POST.description: Create a report for Bitcoin conversion rates and send via email.

suggested_workflow.complete_code_for_action_derived_from_th:
data = await request.get_json()
email = data.get('email')  # Extract email from request data
report_id = str(uuid.uuid4())  # Generate a unique report ID
rates = await fetch_bitcoin_rates()
asyncio.create_task(send_email(report_id, rates, email))  # Send email asynchronously
reports[report_id] = {...}
return jsonify({...}), 202
suggested_workflow.description: Initiates the report creation process and sends an email.
